pages.text:
SYNTHETIC CLINICAL NOTE
Ma benh nhan: SYN-002
Ho ten: Tran Thi Synthetic B
Ngay sinh: 1978-06-22
Gioi tinh: Nu
Tien su benh:
- Tang huyet ap tu nam 2018.
- Suy than man tinh CKD stage 3.
Di ung:
- Di ung Ibuprofen, noi me day.
Thuoc dang dung:
- Losartan 50mg, uong 1 lan/ngay.
- Atorvastatin 20mg, uong 1 lan toi.
Xet nghiem:
Creatinine: 180 umol/L, tham chieu 60-110, cao.
eGFR: 42 mL/min, tham chieu 90-120, thap.
